faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Maplewood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Maplewood, NJ. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the infestation and begin treatment, with most drain fly problems resolved within 1-2 visits.

faqs.question: What does the $350–$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain cleaning, targeted application of safe treatments, removal of organic buildup, and a follow-up visit if needed. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are drain flies common in Maplewood homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, drain flies are quite common in Maplewood, especially in older homes with established plumbing systems and properties with basement drains or bathroom fixtures that aren't used regularly. The area's humid climate also contributes to the organic buildup in drains where these flies breed.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Regular drain maintenance is key to prevention. We recommend weekly hot water flushes, monthly use of bio-enzymatic drain cleaners, fixing any leaky pipes promptly, and ensuring all drains are used regularly. Our technicians will provide specific prevention tips based on your Maplewood property's unique conditions.
